title: Fix the Bubble Sort
description: The following code tries to sort an array using bubble sort, but has a bug — the array is not fully sorted for some inputs. Find and fix it.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers.

botCodes.code:
#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int n;scanf("%d",&n);int a[501];for(int i=0;i<n;i++)scanf("%d",&a[i]);for(int i=0;i<n;i++)for(int j=0;j<n-1-i;j++)if(a[j]>a[j+1]){int t=a[j];a[j]=a[j+1];a[j+1]=t;}for(int i=0;i<n;i++)printf("%d%c",a[i],i<n-1?' ':'\n');}

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in for i=0 to n-2 do for j=0 to n-2-i do if a.(j)>a.(j+1) then(let t=a.(j) in a.(j)<-a.(j+1);a.(j+1)<-t)done done;Array.iter(fun x->Printf.printf"%d " x)a;print_newline()

buggyCode.python:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
for i in range(n):
    for j in range(n - 1):  # BUG: should be n-1-i
        if a[j] > a[j+1]:
            a[j], a[j+1] = a[j+1], a[j]
print(*a)
